description: Color panel render-time settings: palette colors, brightness/contrast adjustments, HSV color shifts, sparkle effects, and chroma keying. These settings are serialized with the C_ prefix in effect XML and consumed by the render engine's PixelBuffer layer.

properties.label: Palette Colors
properties.description: Active palette colors (up to 8 colors per effect). Each palette slot has a color (BUTTON_Palette1-8) and an enabled checkbox (CHECKBOX_Palette1-8). The render engine reads enabled colors via ParseColorMap, building the active xlColorVector and color curves.

properties.label: Sparkles
properties.description: Sparkle frequency count. Multiplied by music factor if MusicSparkles is enabled. Render reads via settingsMap.GetInt(SLIDER_SparkleFrequency, 0); consumed in PixelBuffer layer as sparkle_count, used to add random bright pixels during rendering.

properties.label: Sparkles reflect music
properties.description: Enable music-reactive sparkle count scaling. When true, sparkle_count is multiplied by a music factor (0.0-2.0) from the MusicManager. Render reads via settingsMap.GetBool(CHECKBOX_MusicSparkles, false).

properties.label: Sparkles Color
properties.description: Color used for sparkle pixels. Defaults to white. Render reads via settingsMap.Get(COLOURPICKERCTRL_SparklesColour, "#FFFFFF") and stored in LayerInfo.sparklesColour for use when rendering sparkles.

properties.label: Brightness
properties.description: Brightness multiplier as percentage (100=unchanged). Applied as HSV.value *= brightness/100 in PixelBuffer. Render reads via settingsMap.GetInt(SLIDER_Brightness, 100).

properties.label: Brightness Level
properties.description: Toggle to enable brightness level mode. Alters how brightness adjustment is interpreted. Render reads via settingsMap.GetBool(CHECKBOX_BrightnessLevel, false) and stored in LayerInfo.brightnessLevel.

properties.label: Contrast
properties.description: Contrast adjustment applied after brightness. If HSV.value < 0.5, reduces by (value * contrast/100); else increases. Value of 0=no contrast change. Render reads via settingsMap.GetInt(SLIDER_Contrast, 0).

properties.label: Hue
properties.description: HSV hue shift in 0-1 range (values stored as -100 to 100, divided by 100 at render). Wraps around hue circle. Render reads via settingsMap.GetInt(SLIDER_HueAdjust, 0) and applies as hsv.hue += adjustment/100.

properties.label: Saturation
properties.description: HSV saturation shift in 0-1 range (values stored as -100 to 100, divided by 100 at render). Clamped to [0,1]. Render reads via settingsMap.GetInt(SLIDER_SaturationAdjust, 0) and applies as hsv.saturation += adjustment/100.

properties.label: Value
properties.description: HSV value (lightness) shift in 0-1 range (values stored as -100 to 100, divided by 100 at render). Clamped to [0,1]. Render reads via settingsMap.GetInt(SLIDER_ValueAdjust, 0) and applies as hsv.value += adjustment/100.

properties.label: Enable Chroma Key
properties.description: Enable chroma keying (color-based masking). When enabled, pixels matching the ChromaColour (within ChromaSensitivity threshold) are made transparent. Render reads via settingsMap.GetBool(CHECKBOX_Chroma, false) and stored in LayerInfo.isChromaKey.

properties.label: Chroma Key Sensitivity
properties.description: Tolerance/threshold for chroma key color matching. Range 1-255; higher values match more similar colors. Render reads via settingsMap.GetInt(SLIDER_ChromaSensitivity, 1).

properties.label: Chroma Key Color
properties.description: Reference color for chroma keying. Pixels matching this color (within sensitivity) are removed. Defaults to black. Render reads via settingsMap.Get(COLOURPICKERCTRL_ChromaColour, "") and stored in LayerInfo.chromaKeyColour.

notes: Palette entry points: C_BUTTON_Palette1-8 store color data (hex strings or ColorCurve serialization); C_CHECKBOX_Palette1-8 control active/enabled state. Render engine reads both via ParseColorMap in Effect.cpp::151.

Value curves: SparkleFrequency, Brightness, Color_HueAdjust, Color_SaturationAdjust, Color_ValueAdjust all support time-varying curves via VALUECURVE_* keys. PixelBuffer reads these via ComputeValueCurve and GetOutputValueAt.
HSV adjustments: Hue wraps at 0/1 boundary; Saturation and Value are clamped to [0,1] range after adjustment.
Brightness: stored as integer 0-400 representing percent (100 = 1.0x). Applied before contrast in PixelBuffer line 1471.
Contrast: applied post-brightness via piecewise function (line 1474-1478): if V<0.5 reduce, else increase. Creates S-curve effect.
Chroma key and Sparkles color default to black and white respectively, but panel defaults may override (wxs shows #000000 and wxSYS_COLOUR_BTNHIGHLIGHT).
BrightnessLevel checkbox mode changes how brightness is interpreted - semantics TBD in render engine.
No dead settings found: all panel controls (C_ prefixed) are read by render engine at SetLayerSettings.
All SLIDER_/CHECKBOX_/VALUECURVE_/COLOURPICKERCTRL_ keys are prefixed with C_ when persisted and stripped on CopySettingsMap (Effect.cpp:704-706).
